characters.physical_details: 6'1", lean sprinter's build with bilateral graft symmetry. Synthetic grafts in both legs, a spinal neural bridge, and visual enhancement after reconstruction at 27. After Ch 5: cheek and brow scars, a right shoulder that healed but clicks, and a left wrist that aches permanently.

key_relationships.yusuf_qadir: engineer-athlete trust broken after the archive discovery
key_relationships.margot_voss: confrontational after her concealment of Lena's condition and her treatment of Tomas
key_relationships.tomas_reyes: senior athlete he feels responsible for after Tomas's injury

characters.occupation_status: Professional Apex Games 200m sprinter, Meridian-sponsored; considering a SportsVision commentary screen test after Doha.

state_transitions.change: Virus-triggered blackout at 140m causes right-shoulder dislocation, distal left-radius fracture, and facial lacerations.
Begins private override training to interrupt autonomous muscle firing before it completes a movement.
Begins a romantic relationship with Lena and realizes his bridge can intrude into touch and sex.
Discovers Yusuf's private archive and code evidence tying the virus to Meridian; trust in Yusuf fractures.
Races unpatched in Doha; catches the blackout lead-in, forces his legs out of sprint retention, and finishes last.
In Lausanne, still living with small early body corrections; receives a SportsVision screen-test offer and has not decided whether to take it.

characters.physical_details: 5'10", swimmer's build with broad shoulders and a long torso. Neural-link port visible at the base of her skull. During desync her face flattens and her eyes stop making small tracking adjustments.
characters.occupation_status: Professional Apex Games 400m/800m freestyle swimmer; Meridian developmental-program athlete from birth, raised largely in training facilities around Zug.

state_transitions.change: First legible desync symptoms: missing-time episodes and link-made motor choices.
Loses roughly 150m of conscious experience in training; Margot conceals the severity in the official summary.
Begins a romantic relationship with Kai.
Takes Yusuf's patch; desync and autonomous pattern initiation stop, but reaction time, proprioception, and sensory smoothing worsen.
Swims the Doha 400m freestyle fully present and wins bronze.
Training independently in Montreux; brief legacy corrections still surface, but she can detect and stop them.

characters.physical_details: 5'9", slight, dark-haired, steady-handed, usually rumpled. Wears ordinary prescription glasses.

key_relationships.kai_brennan: professional trust broken after the archive discovery
key_relationships.lena_morozova: installs her patch and becomes one of the few people she trusts with her system
key_relationships.petra_engel: professional alliance built on institutional distrust
key_relationships.farah_qadir: younger sister and primary personal motivation
key_relationships.margot_voss: adversarial once the coaching-feed concealment is exposed

characters.occupation_status: Lead calibration engineer at Kirchberg Institute until his public release of the Meridian analysis; working from Lausanne by chapter_18.
characters.literacy_languages: English (native, Birmingham dialect), Urdu (fluent), Arabic (reading proficiency), technical code literacy.

state_transitions.change: Finds Meridian-like signatures in the virus and begins designing a non-Meridian patch; Petra covers the unauthorized work.
Tells the group about Farah and admits he used archived athlete data in the patch work.
Kai discovers the archive; Yusuf reveals his suspicion that the virus came from Meridian's toolchain.
Publishes the virus analysis and a de-identified archive extract, triggering legal threats, an inquiry, and public scrutiny.

characters.availability: Present through Doha; in Lausanne by chapter_18.

characters.physical_details: 5'8", former elite swimmer's build gone softer; personal wrist-mounted feed interface leaves a pale strap mark. After Tomas's crash she experiences intermittent phantom leg deadness.

key_relationships.kai_brennan: confrontational after her treatment of Lena and Tomas is exposed
key_relationships.tomas_reyes: coach whose pressure and feed use contribute to his crash
key_relationships.petra_engel: medical superior who audits and suspends her

characters.occupation_status: Neural performance coach at Kirchberg Institute until suspension in chapter_15; former 200m butterfly Olympian, fifth at Brisbane 2028.

state_transitions.change: Pushes Tomas above safe range and starts the telemetry pattern of overreach.
Suppresses Lena's Class III-equivalent pool episode and keeps the raw feed cache private.
Experiences Tomas's crash and paralysis through the live feed.
Suspended from coaching; feed access revoked; addiction and feed-vector concealment exposed.
Six weeks into treatment at NeuroBalance in Munich, still experiencing feed cravings.

characters.availability: Present through departure; absent from Doha; in Munich by chapter_18.

characters.physical_details: Tall, angular, grey-streaked, clinically precise, chronically tired-looking.

key_relationships.yusuf_qadir: professional alliance; she covers his unauthorized work while demanding review authority
key_relationships.margot_voss: medical oversight; she audits and suspends her

characters.occupation_status: Medical director, Kirchberg Institute; previously at Meridian's Stuttgart facility, where her warning about decathlete Marius Koch's graft rejection was overruled.

state_transitions.change: Covers Yusuf's unauthorized patch work while demanding clinical review control.
Pulls the raw feed logs, exposes Margot's pattern, and suspends her.

characters.availability: At Kirchberg through chapter_16; coordinating remotely by chapter_18.

characters.physical_details: Expressive decathlete build, three years into enhancement, still visibly less settled into it than older athletes.

key_relationships.margot_voss: coach who pushes him above safe range

characters.occupation_status: Professional Apex Games decathlete, first Games, Meridian-sponsored; family in Quito depends on the sponsorship income.

state_transitions.change: Overpushed hurdle session causes a minor knee injury and starts a documented heart-rate pattern.
Signs Meridian's data-rights contract and takes the stability patch to protect family income.
Virus blackout at the seventh hurdle destroys his neural bridge, leaves him paralyzed from the waist down, and ends his athletic career.

key_relationships.lena_morozova: athlete she tries to persuade without condescension
key_relationships.yusuf_qadir: opposes his untested patch from genuine conviction

characters.occupation_status: Athlete liaison, Meridian BioSystems; corporate representative driven by her brother's 2034 enhancement-cascade death.

state_transitions.change: Arrives with the Meridian delegation and presents the contract-plus-patch offer.
Argues against Yusuf's patch from the perspective of someone who has already seen a fatal cascade failure.

characters.availability: Present from chapter_08 through the contract negotiations.

characters.physical_details: Nordic-looking swimmer with efficient movement and subtly flattened affect.

key_relationships.lena_morozova: training partner and possible picture of Lena's optimized future

characters.occupation_status: Professional Apex Games swimmer (400m, 800m freestyle), Bergen program.
characters.availability: At Kirchberg through the pre-Doha period.

characters.physical_details: Seen only on video. Dark hair; progressive Voss-Kessler shows in slowed speech, word-finding pauses, and occasional hand slips.
characters.occupation_status: Lives in Birmingham with a flatmate; Voss-Kessler is progressive.

state_transitions.change: Progression is visible in slower speech, grip slips, and word losses.

timeline.story_start: Late January 2038 at Kirchberg Institute in the Bernese Alps, about six months before the Apex Games in Doha.

seasonal_track.season: Late January to early February: deep winter, snowbanks, thin air, mostly indoor life.
February: shutdown, contract pressure, and worsening symptoms in persistent cold.
Late winter into spring thaw: longer light, runoff, and exposed rock.
Late June: departures from the Alps toward Zurich and Doha.
Late July in Doha: extreme heat outside, refrigerated venues inside.
August in Lausanne, Montreux, and Munich.

key_events.event: Kai's blackout crash exposes the network corruption.
Meridian delegation presents the data-rights contract and stability patch.
Lena chooses and receives Yusuf's patch.
Tomas's blackout destroys his neural bridge and ends his career.
Margot is suspended after Petra audits the raw feed logs.
The remaining team departs through Zurich for Doha.
Lena wins bronze in the 400m freestyle and Kai stops his own legs mid-race in the 200m final.
Yusuf publishes the virus analysis and a de-identified archive extract; public inquiries begin.

geography.primary_setting: Kirchberg Institute: a concrete-and-glass training and calibration campus above Meiringen in the Bernese Alps at roughly 2,100m.

key_locations.name: Calibration Bay
key_locations.details: Cold, sterile room of rigs, monitors, and processor hum; Yusuf's main workspace.

key_locations.name: Indoor Track
key_locations.details: Altitude-controlled 200m indoor oval; site of Kai's blackout crash and Tomas's later hurdle catastrophe.

key_locations.name: Olympic Pool
key_locations.details: 50m pool with observation deck and attached coaching suite.

key_locations.name: Medical Wing
key_locations.details: Imaging, recovery rooms, and Petra's office; becomes the crisis center after the shutdown.

key_locations.name: Neural Coaching Suite
key_locations.details: Small room beside the pool where Margot runs and conceals feed sessions.

key_locations.name: Cafeteria and Athletes' Quarters
key_locations.details: Communal core of Kirchberg; room displays show enhancement diagnostics at night.

key_locations.name: Davos training base
key_locations.details: Secondary Swiss site where some late-June holdouts remain.

key_locations.name: Doha Apex Games venue
key_locations.details: Air-conditioned competition complex built for broadcast spectacle.

key_locations.name: Centre Sportif, Montreux
key_locations.details: Small 25m municipal pool where Lena trains independently in chapter_18.

key_locations.name: NeuroBalance, Munich
key_locations.details: Schwabing treatment facility for neural-interface addiction.

distances: Kirchberg Institute to Meiringen: about 30 minutes by road on one mountain road.
Kirchberg Institute to Zurich: about 2 hours by road.
Kirchberg Institute to Doha: international flight after transfer through Zurich.
Calibration Bay to Indoor Track: same building, a short corridor walk.
Lausanne to Montreux: about 30 minutes by train along Lake Geneva.

world_rules: The Apex Games are a separate enhanced-sport system, not the traditional Olympics.
Bio-integrative enhancement is legal: neural links, synthetic muscle grafts, spinal bridges, and sensory augments are normal for Apex athletes.
Shared calibration handshakes can spread corrupted firmware through the enhancement network.
Blackouts and desync can remove sensory awareness while autonomous motor systems keep executing the last instruction.
Neural coaching feeds are bidirectional: coaches receive sensation and can send pacing or micro-corrections through the same pathway.
Coach-side raw telemetry can be hidden from routine medical review if only a summary sync is exported; audits can still expose the raw cache.
Meridian dominates hardware, sponsorship, and calibration infrastructure, so medical decisions are never fully free of corporate leverage.
Meridian's stability patch preserves full optimization but requires permanent, transferable rights to biometric, genetic, neural, and baseline physiological data.
Yusuf's patch blocks the corruption without surrendering data, but permanently kills the live coaching feed and removes roughly 10-15% of optimization help.
Voss-Kessler syndrome is a progressive neural disease unrelated to enhancement.
Enhanced bodies can heal unusually fast and can keep running stored motor routines after conscious control drops out.

power_structure.over: Enhanced athletes and institutes like Kirchberg
power_structure.mechanism: Sponsorship contracts, proprietary hardware, calibration infrastructure, and data-rights leverage.
Control of schedules, access, shutdowns, and facility operations.
Medical-director authority to ground athletes, order audits, and suspend staff.
Technical control of calibration, diagnostics, and patch design.

power_structure.over: Athletes in live feed sessions until chapter_15
power_structure.mechanism: Coach-side access to sensation, pacing, and in-session load decisions.

objects.name: Yusuf's encrypted personal archive
objects.origin: Private device and mirrored backups fed by unauthorized calibration exports.
objects.status: Built from February onward; discovered by Kai in chapter_14; partly de-identified and published in chapter_18.

objects.name: Margot's feed interface
objects.status: Used abusively through chapter_14; network authorization revoked in chapter_15; absent from her treatment life in chapter_18.

objects.name: Meridian data-rights contract
objects.origin: Brought up the mountain with the stability patch offer.
objects.status: Signed by most athletes; refused by Kai, Lena, and a shrinking group of holdouts.

objects.name: Meridian stability patch
objects.status: Maintains full optimization for signers but fails to prevent Tomas's catastrophic blackout in chapter_14.

objects.name: Kai's wrist brace
objects.origin: Medical support after the chapter_05 crash.
objects.status: Removed after healing, but the wrist remains a chronic weak point.

objects.name: Yusuf's compartmentalized patch
objects.origin: Built in the calibration bay from archived data and reverse-engineered virus analysis.
objects.status: Installed in Lena in chapter_13 and later in a few other holdouts; kills live coaching feed and optimization smoothing.

objects.name: Lena's Doha bronze medal
objects.origin: 400m freestyle final at the Apex Games.
objects.status: Won in chapter_17; public symbol of a slower but fully continuous race.

objects.name: Yusuf's public virus-analysis release
objects.origin: Research article plus public code and dataset repositories.
objects.status: Live in chapter_18; triggers an inquiry, legal threats, and an 11% Meridian stock drop.

income_sources.source: Meridian sponsorship, federation support, and bonuses tied to selection and results
income_sources.amount: Variable by athlete; for some athletes it directly supports family housing or household income.
income_sources.reliability: Stable only while the athlete remains selectable, competitive, and contract-compliant.
Institutionally essential; it limits how hard the institute can openly oppose Meridian.

knowledge_state.knows: The virus carries structural signatures pointing to Meridian's internal toolchain, though not courtroom-proof authorship yet.
knowledge_state.hidden_from: Everyone except Petra until Kai learns the code evidence in chapter_14; public in modified form by chapter_18.

knowledge_state.knows: He has been copying athletes' raw calibration data into a private archive for Farah-related research and for the alternative patch.
knowledge_state.hidden_from: Everyone until the group hears the motive in chapter_12 and Kai sees the archive in chapter_14.

knowledge_state.knows: Lena's chapter_10 pool event was a severe missing-time episode, not ordinary drift, and she altered the record to hide that.
knowledge_state.hidden_from: Petra and the official record until the chapter_15 audit; Lena only knows the official summary is false before then.

knowledge_state.knows: The coaching feed is a viable virus-propagation route.
knowledge_state.hidden_from: Everyone until Petra proves it in the chapter_15 audit.

knowledge_state.knows: She is using feed sessions as an addiction and is systematically pushing athletes above safe heart-rate zones for the feeling.
knowledge_state.hidden_from: Everyone until the raw feed logs are reviewed in chapter_15.

knowledge_state.knows: Yusuf is doing unauthorized late-night patch and code work and carrying off-book exports out of the bay.
knowledge_state.hidden_from: Facility administration and Meridian unless Petra chooses to expose it.

knowledge_state.knows: Yusuf privately archived athlete data and has code evidence strong enough to make Meridian look like the virus source.
knowledge_state.hidden_from: Most athletes until Yusuf's public release in chapter_18.

knowledge_state.knows: Lena's desync onset shows as flat affect, fixed eyes, and the hand moving toward the port.
Margot changed her chapter_10 session summary from a severe missing-time event into a coach-authorized build.

environmental_constants: Kirchberg sits at roughly 2,100m; new arrivals feel the thin alpine air.
The calibration bay has a constant low processor hum.
The pool smells of chlorine, and Lena carries it in her hair and skin.
The indoor track smells of rubber and throws back footfall echoes.
Winter snow gives way to spring runoff, mud, and exposed rock on the south-facing slopes.
Room displays glow with enhancement diagnostics at night.
Doha is all heat outside and aggressive air-conditioning inside.
Post-patch, Lena experiences the inside of her head as newly quiet.
